content.en:
Xishan, internal space-time.

A high-level Xishan gathers here, and Ye Tian is also among them.

It didn't take long for four bone mutant creatures to appear.

Heather.

Giant bones.

Through the river.

Desertion.

These are the names of the four bone transformation creatures, among which Xi Huang is the son of the founder of Xishan and the current leader of Xishan, but his strength is not the strongest, and the strongest is still the Lord of Giant Bone.

However, at this time, it was still the Lord of the Desolation who spoke.

The Lord of the Desolation spoke, "Ladies and gentlemen, this meeting is mainly to discuss the issue of quotas in the primeval gold realm. "

"The primeval world has opened?"

A creature of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm was surprised.

Many high-level officials have started to talk about it.

"The primeval gold realm?"

Ye Tian didn't know this place, so he was a little puzzled.

Immediately, he asked Gu Xing.

"Elder Gu Xing, what is the place in the Ancient Neture Realm?" Ye Tian asked.

"Bloodfish Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Gold Realm is a world that appeared after the Ancient Gold Tablet was broken, it was originally impossible to enter, but after the Ancient Gold Tablet was broken, it would appear once in a long time. However, the bone degeneration realm could not enter. There are only two ways to enter the Taikoo Gold Monument, and the first way is to completely pass the five assessments of the Taikoo Gold Monument before the Taikoo Gold Monument is broken. In that case, you can go in now. The second way is to force it in. With the strength of our Xishan Four Bone Transformation Realm, we can probably stuff five to six Blood Transformation Realm creatures into it. So, everyone wants to go in, but there are too few places!" Gu Xing said.

"Is there any benefit to the Swire Golden Realm?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"There are naturally many benefits, it is easier to create the Ancient Bone Technique, you can create a lot of Ancient Bone Technique in a short period of time, I have entered it before, and I have created more than thirty Ancient Bone Techniques at one time, but it is only the first time to enter the Ancient Bone Realm, and the effect is the best!" Gu Xing said.

"Create more than thirty top-notch primeval bone techniques at once!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

It is very difficult to create the Ancient Bone Technique, Gu Xing is definitely not like him, he can try his body, scrap his body again and again to create, and it must be extremely difficult to comprehend the Ancient Golden Script, but it is so easy to create so many top-notch Ancient Bone Techniques in the Ancient Golden Realm, which shows that the value of the Ancient Golden Realm is too high.

"The Hunhe River Realm is so powerful, and so many bone transformation realms have been born, I'm afraid it has something to do with the Ancient Gold Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, he has just joined Xishan, and there is definitely no hope of getting this place.

Several of Xishan's bone transformation realms will give him a place unless they are stupid.

Moreover, it is even more difficult for the primeval-level genius itself to become a bone transformation realm, especially when the last few immeasurable bones are to be transformed, the difficulty is unimaginable, it is not just by creating a top-notch primeval bone technique, the transformation can be completed, if it is so simple, the bone transformation realm will not be so rare.

Of course.

Ye Tian felt that this bottleneck would definitely not be difficult for him.

Soon, these high-level officials voted on a voting situation to decide who the quota would be for.

That's where fame and connections come in.

There is no doubt that there can be no high-level vote for him, unless he votes for himself himself, but there is no point in that.

So, Ye Tian chose to give Gu Xing the opportunity to vote.

Anyway, he felt that Gu Xing would definitely be chosen.

Sure enough, one of the several places returned to the ancient star.

......

"The ancient gold tablet of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift has been broken, so the Hunhe River Boundary Rift can enter the Ancient Gold Realm. At present, the Hunhe River Boundary Rift has not been completely integrated into the territorial sea boundary Rift, and it is still a part of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, so it is forcibly entered into the primeval gold realm from the Hunhe River Boundary Rift. The ancient gold monument at the boundary of the territorial sea is still intact, and there is no way to enter the ancient gold boundary from the seam of the territorial waters. "

"First of all, the primeval gold boundary should be the same, after all, the Hunhe boundary seam is attached to the territorial sea boundary seam, and it should not be different. If it is the same, the ancient gold tablet is equivalent to a connection point, but the connection point of the Hunhe River boundary crack has been opened. "

"I have passed the five examinations of the Swire Gold Monument in the territorial waters, and this assessment record must be recorded in the Swire Gold Realm. In that case, wouldn't I be able to break into the Ancient Gold Realm directly from the Muddy River Realm?"

"Let's try it, it's a big deal to lose a duplicate body and expose the clones, and they just think I have more doppelgangers. "

Thinking like this, Ye Tian was ready to give it a try, and when the entrance of the primeval gold realm appeared, he took the opportunity to forcibly rush in.

Soon after, the entrance to the Swire Golden World stabilized.

Whew!!!

One by one, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm went to the entrance of the Ancient Netherworld.

This time, it was also their luck that this entrance happened to be in this part of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, and if it was in the other part of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, it would not be their turn.

Ye Tian, the Blood Fish Heavenly Ancestor's copy body, also followed the large army of Xishan, although he didn't get a quota and couldn't enter there, but he was able to come here to see the excitement!

And Ye Tian's true body copy body is hidden in the void in the body of another blood transformation realm copy body, anyway, this blood transformation realm copy body is a temporary copy, it is used for sacrifice.

He didn't approach at first, lest he be discovered, so he hid in the dark.

When these bone transformation realms tore the entrances one by one and sent the blood transformation realm creatures who had obtained the quota to enter, he took the opportunity to try to break into the primeval gold realm, so that he would not be blocked, and the success rate was very large.

If he appeared early, he would definitely be discovered by the creatures of the Bone Transformation Realm, and then kill him with one punch.

Time passes slowly.

Finally, the Bone Mutant Realm creatures struck.

Bang!!!!

The terrifying force forcibly tore through the entrances to form small passages, and then sent the ancient stars and other blood transformation realm creatures inside.

"It's now!"

Ye Tian let this Blood Transformation Realm creature copy body and rush over, and his true body was hidden in it.

Swish!

The speed of the Blood Transformation Realm creature is very fast, and it can leap over in an instant, as long as it is not blocked, then it is no problem.

And these bone transformation realms naturally have no time to stop them, and they won't even pay attention to them.

After all, there is no quota, but there have always been fools who want to forcibly break into the Swire Gold Realm, so they also think that Ye Tian is such a fool, and they don't seriously spy on Ye Tian's situation at all.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian rushed out of the body of this Blood Transformation Realm creature replica and stepped directly into the entrance of the Ancient Netherworld.

"What a gut!!!

"Look for death!!"

They all recognized it, Ye Tian was an ancient-level genius in the territorial sea realm, and he dared to sneak in, and he also wanted to break into the primeval gold realm.

Hehe!!!

They didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to enter the Ancient Gold Realm, so they were ready to kill Ye Tian.

However.

Shout!

Ye Tian directly entered the Ancient Gold Realm without being hindered.

At this moment, they were all dumbfounded!
